arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Redshift Serverless workgroup.

endpoint.description: The endpoint information for connecting to the Redshift Serverless workgroup.

enhanced_vpc_routing.description: Indicates whether enhanced VPC routing is enabled for the workgroup.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Redshift Serverless workgroup.

namespace_name.description: The name of the namespace associated with the Redshift Serverless workgroup.

publicly_accessible.description: Indicates whether the workgroup is accessible from the internet.

security_group_ids.description: The set of security group IDs associated with the workgroup.

subnet_ids.description: The set of subnet IDs associated with the workgroup.

workgroup_id.description: The identifier for the Redshift Serverless workgroup.
